title: Eastern Cape inventor set on improving amputees' lives
description: HEALTH NEWS - It is estimated that there are...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"HEALTH NEWS - It is estimated that there are more than 300 000 amputees in South Africa, with many from lower income households unable to afford quality, if any, prosthetic legs which can cost upwards of R100 000. This, amidst the public health system that often lacks resources and has long waiting lists for those in need.","html":"HEALTH NEWS - It is estimated that there are more than 300 000 amputees in South Africa, with many from lower income households unable to afford quality, if any, prosthetic legs which can cost upwards of R100 000. This, amidst the public health system that often lacks resources and has long waiting lists for those in need."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More than seven years ago, Eastern Cape entrepreneur and innovator, Zanodumo Godlimpi, made it his mission to do something about this.","html":"More than seven years ago, Eastern Cape entrepreneur and innovator, Zanodumo Godlimpi, made it his mission to do something about this."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His hard work and determination paid off recently when he was named the 2025 EDHE Studentpreneur of the Year, winning R120 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The announcement was made at the seventh annual Entrepreneurship Development in Higher Education (EDHE) Entrepreneurship Intervarsity.","html":"The announcement was made at the seventh annual Entrepreneurship Development in Higher Education (EDHE) Entrepreneurship Intervarsity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Walter Sisulu University (WSU) part-time postgraduate student and employee won a further R25 000 as winner in the Academic Research Commercialisation category.","html":"The Walter Sisulu University (WSU) part-time postgraduate student and employee won a further R25 000 as winner in the Academic Research Commercialisation category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Godlimpi was rewarded for his cost-effective design of a pneumatic prosthetic foot, an advanced type of prosthetic that uses air pressure (pneumatics) for more powerful and adaptive movement, often mimicking the biomechanics of a natural ankle. The device provides dynamic support, control and energy return; offering greater range of motion and responsiveness than basic passive feet.","html":"Godlimpi was rewarded for his cost-effective design of a pneumatic prosthetic foot, an advanced type of prosthetic that uses air pressure (pneumatics) for more powerful and adaptive movement, often mimicking the biomechanics of a natural ankle. The device provides dynamic support, control and energy return; offering greater range of motion and responsiveness than basic passive feet."},{"type":"heading","text":"Huge moment","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When his name was announced as the winner at the awards ceremony, which took place in Johannesburg, Godlimpi says he reacted purely out of instinct.","html":"When his name was announced as the winner at the awards ceremony, which took place in Johannesburg, Godlimpi says he reacted purely out of instinct."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I jumped from my seat and rushed to the stage. That moment captured the overwhelming excitement and disbelief I felt.","html":"\"I jumped from my seat and rushed to the stage. That moment captured the overwhelming excitement and disbelief I felt."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Even after the ceremony, the feeling didn’t fade. I kept replaying the moment in my mind, trying to make sense of it all. I struggled to sleep because the adrenaline was still there.","html":"\"Even after the ceremony, the feeling didn’t fade. I kept replaying the moment in my mind, trying to make sense of it all. I struggled to sleep because the adrenaline was still there."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"At one point during the night, I actually woke up to check whether the trophies were still where I left them because it genuinely felt unreal. It was a powerful reminder of how far my journey has come and how meaningful this recognition is.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The EDHE, a programme of the Department of Higher Education and Training (DHET) administered and implemented by Universities South Africa (USAf), is the custodian of the annual EDHE Entrepreneurship Intervarsity. EDHE is predominantly funded through the University Capacity Development Programme (UCDP) of the DHET.","html":"The EDHE, a programme of the Department of Higher Education and Training (DHET) administered and implemented by Universities South Africa (USAf), is the custodian of the annual EDHE Entrepreneurship Intervarsity. EDHE is predominantly funded through the University Capacity Development Programme (UCDP) of the DHET."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Intervarsity is a platform designed to identify, recognise and celebrate top student entrepreneurs at South Africa’s 26 public universities. The event has, over the years, enjoyed the support of numerous private sector entities including the SAB Foundation, which, in 2025, supported the initiative for the sixth year in a row.","html":"The Intervarsity is a platform designed to identify, recognise and celebrate top student entrepreneurs at South Africa’s 26 public universities. The event has, over the years, enjoyed the support of numerous private sector entities including the SAB Foundation, which, in 2025, supported the initiative for the sixth year in a row."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zanodumo Godlimpi, shows off his award and R120 000 prize.","html":"Zanodumo Godlimpi, shows off his award and R120 000 prize. "},{"type":"heading","text":"Winning design","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Godlimpi explains what is different about his design.","html":"Godlimpi explains what is different about his design."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The pneumatic prosthetic foot is an artificial foot and ankle that is meant to replace the missing limb for people who have been amputated below the knee.","html":"“The pneumatic prosthetic foot is an artificial foot and ankle that is meant to replace the missing limb for people who have been amputated below the knee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"There are a number of prosthetic devices on the market that do the same function; however, these devices have not been significantly adopted in the African setting due to the level of complexity, which impacts repairability and the high cost of purchase.","html":"\"There are a number of prosthetic devices on the market that do the same function; however, these devices have not been significantly adopted in the African setting due to the level of complexity, which impacts repairability and the high cost of purchase."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"What's different about the pneumatic prosthetic foot is that we have used pneumatics instead of an electrical motor, which enables this innovation to have minimal electrical components."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Also, the components are locally sourced, which plays a significant role in the cost and reducing the repair time of this device. The innovation is aimed at low and middle-income amputees, living in low-resourced settings.”","html":"\"Also, the components are locally sourced, which plays a significant role in the cost and reducing the repair time of this device. The innovation is aimed at low and middle-income amputees, living in low-resourced settings.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While studying at the Medicine and Health Sciences faculty at WSU, Godlimpi had to spend time in a public hospital.","html":"While studying at the Medicine and Health Sciences faculty at WSU, Godlimpi had to spend time in a public hospital."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“I saw that although the patients were fitted with prosthetic devices and were able to walk, they could not simulate the normal way of walking, similar to non-amputees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The difficulty was worse for patients who lived in rural areas where there is a lack of basic infrastructure. Some of the comments from those I spoke to highlighted difficulties walking uphill and down slopes, where the patients would feel like their foot was pushing them backwards or their knees felt unstable.","html":"\"The difficulty was worse for patients who lived in rural areas where there is a lack of basic infrastructure. Some of the comments from those I spoke to highlighted difficulties walking uphill and down slopes, where the patients would feel like their foot was pushing them backwards or their knees felt unstable."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Adaptive, powered prosthetic devices were available during that time; however, this remains a luxury for our people, both then and now. And so in 2018, I started working on my prosthetic foot protype to address the problems faced by this specific part of the population.","html":"“Adaptive, powered prosthetic devices were available during that time; however, this remains a luxury for our people, both then and now. And so in 2018, I started working on my prosthetic foot protype to address the problems faced by this specific part of the population."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I took my book allowance money and bought a pneumatic cylinder and other components to develop my first model,” he explains."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to the promising outcomes, Godlimpi and a colleague applied for funding from the Technology and Innovation Agency, which granted them R485 000 to further develop the prototype. With the help of WSU, he has filed patents in South Africa, China and Europe.","html":"Thanks to the promising outcomes, Godlimpi and a colleague applied for funding from the Technology and Innovation Agency, which granted them R485 000 to further develop the prototype. With the help of WSU, he has filed patents in South Africa, China and Europe."},{"type":"heading","text":"More tests to follow","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His EDHE R120 000 prize money will be used to buy a 3D printer as well as assisting in covering travelling costs during the second phase of testing.","html":"His EDHE R120 000 prize money will be used to buy a 3D printer as well as assisting in covering travelling costs during the second phase of testing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I am currently preparing for the next phase of testing that will include an increased number of participants both in the laboratory and in the actual environment where this innovation will be used.","html":"“I am currently preparing for the next phase of testing that will include an increased number of participants both in the laboratory and in the actual environment where this innovation will be used."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"These tests are key to validating the performance outcomes of this prototype. In terms of professional development, I am planning to further my studies by doing a PhD, which will not only assist in facilitating research and development of this innovation, but also position me as an expert in this research field.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"What is next?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So where does he see himself in the next five years?","html":"So where does he see himself in the next five years?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Running a company specialising in designing and manufacturing prosthetic devices and components.","html":"“Running a company specialising in designing and manufacturing prosthetic devices and components."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The current prosthetic foot innovation will be segmented into three tiers – a lower tier with fewer features, a middle tier with robust gait adaptation and energy input, and a premium product that is connected to an AI-powered application for real-time gait parameter tuning, enabling seamless and smooth step-to-step transitions.","html":"\"The current prosthetic foot innovation will be segmented into three tiers – a lower tier with fewer features, a middle tier with robust gait adaptation and energy input, and a premium product that is connected to an AI-powered application for real-time gait parameter tuning, enabling seamless and smooth step-to-step transitions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"This strategy will ensure that various people have access to this innovation and not be limited by the price.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Godlimpi believes that competitions such as the EDHE Entrepreneurship Intervarsity are important as they allow emerging innovators and entrepreneurs to showcase their work to potential investors, business partners and clients. It also creates opportunities for mentorship, networking and access to resources that many young innovators would not otherwise have.","html":"Godlimpi believes that competitions such as the EDHE Entrepreneurship Intervarsity are important as they allow emerging innovators and entrepreneurs to showcase their work to potential investors, business partners and clients. It also creates opportunities for mentorship, networking and access to resources that many young innovators would not otherwise have."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Beyond funding and visibility, they help validate ideas, build confidence and open doors for collaboration, ultimately accelerating the journey from concept to real-world impact,” he says.","html":"“Beyond funding and visibility, they help validate ideas, build confidence and open doors for collaboration, ultimately accelerating the journey from concept to real-world impact,” he says."},{"type":"heading","text":"Busy life","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Even though he has lived and breathed designing and building his pneumatic prosthetic foot prototype for the past seven years, he believes that even the most passionate inventor needs downtime. “I go to the gym and watch soccer. I am an ardent Kaizer Chiefs supporter! I also spend time in the holidays doing carpentry; a skill I taught myself. It allows me to be creative and switch off from the world while focusing on the work in front of me.”","html":"Even though he has lived and breathed designing and building his pneumatic prosthetic foot prototype for the past seven years, he believes that even the most passionate inventor needs downtime. “I go to the gym and watch soccer. I am an ardent Kaizer Chiefs supporter! I also spend time in the holidays doing carpentry; a skill I taught myself. It allows me to be creative and switch off from the world while focusing on the work in front of me.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Godlimpi says he will be eternally grateful for the support he has received throughout his entrepreneurial journey to make a meaningful difference in the lives of amputees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“My work has been strengthened by the unwavering support from the WSU Office of Technology Transfer and the Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences. It also reflects the value of collaboration across institutions; the progress we have is thanks to our partnership with the Centre for Rapid Prototyping and Manufacturing at the Central University of Technology in Bloemfontein.","html":"“My work has been strengthened by the unwavering support from the WSU Office of Technology Transfer and the Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences. It also reflects the value of collaboration across institutions; the progress we have is thanks to our partnership with the Centre for Rapid Prototyping and Manufacturing at the Central University of Technology in Bloemfontein."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I am open to collaborating with potential partners who share the vision of creating meaningful impact and supporting the commercialisation of this innovation.”","html":"\"I am open to collaborating with potential partners who share the vision of creating meaningful impact and supporting the commercialisation of this innovation.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Janine Greenleaf Walker is a contract writer for Universities South Africa.","html":"• Janine Greenleaf Walker is a contract writer for Universities South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Eastern Cape inventor set on improving amputees' lives
Eastern Cape inventor set on improving amputees' lives
